Terms of Use

Last updated: 23 May 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing starburstslots.co.za, you agree to these terms of use. If you do not agree, do not use this site.

2. Purpose

This site provides informational content about the Starburst slot game by NetEnt and related casino topics. Content is for informational and entertainment purposes only. Nothing on this site constitutes financial advice, legal advice, or a guarantee of gambling outcomes.

3. Age Restriction

This site is intended for users aged 18 and over. Gambling is restricted to adults in South Africa. If you are under 18, do not use this site or follow links to casino operators.

4. Affiliate Disclosure

This site participates in affiliate programmes with casino operators. When you click certain links and complete qualifying actions (such as registering and depositing), we may receive a commission. This does not affect the terms or prices offered to you by the casino. All affiliate links are marked with rel="nofollow".

5. Accuracy of Information

We make reasonable efforts to keep RTP figures, bonus terms, and casino information accurate and up to date. However, casino terms change frequently. Always verify current terms directly with the casino operator before making any financial decisions.

6. Limitation of Liability

We are not liable for any losses — financial or otherwise — resulting from gambling activity undertaken after visiting this site. Gambling carries financial risk. Never wager money you cannot afford to lose. We are not liable for the practices or content of third-party casino sites linked from this site.

7. Intellectual Property

All original content on this site (text, structure, code) is the property of Starburst Slots ZA. Game imagery and trademarks related to Starburst are the property of NetEnt AB. Reproduction of this site's content without written permission is prohibited.

8. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of South Africa.
